channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: President Ruto Reunites with Former Principal Mark Sing'oei During Kapsabet Boys Centenary Celebrations
item.description: During the centenary celebrations of Kapsabet Boys High School, established in 1925, President William Ruto made a heartfelt appearance at his former school. He wore the full school uniform, which bro...

item.title: Katsina United Threatens Legal Steps Over Absentee Player Uche Collins
item.description: Katsina United don yan legal action against their main striker, Uche Collins, after dem declare am AWOL (Absent Without Official Leave) from the club. Na Nigeria Premier Football League team dey talk ...

item.title: Former MK MPs Face Court Eviction From State-Supported Parliamentary Housing
item.description: The Department of Public Works in South Africa is preparing to take legal action to evict three former uMkhonto we Sizwe (MK) MPs who have refused to vacate parliamentary village housing since their d...

item.title: Authorities Respond to Vehicle and Shooting Incident at Michigan Synagogue
item.description: Authorities responded to a violent incident at Temple Israel, a large Reform synagogue in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan. According to the Oakland County Sheriff’s Office, an individual engaged in...

item.title: Lt Gen Vuma Testifies About Threats and Political Interference During SAPS Tenure
item.description: The Ad Hoc Committee in the South African Parliament has been hearing testimony from retired Lieutenant General Francinah Vuma regarding threats to her life and alleged political interference within t...

item.title: Tanzania Government Calls for Enhanced Collaboration on School Feeding and Nutrition Services
item.description: The Tanzanian government has called on education and nutrition stakeholders to strengthen collaboration in supporting school feeding programmes and improving essential services in schools to enhance s...

item.title: NSW Premier Emphasises Budget Restraint Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: NSW Premier Chris Minns has stressed that his government has been cautious with public spending, noting that the state’s expenses growth has been cut to a third of the level seen in federal Labor. Spe...

item.title: Iran signals continued closure of Strait of Hormuz amid escalating tensions
item.description: Iran’s recently appointed supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, has declared that the country will maintain its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz as leverage against the United States and Israel. The remar...

item.title: Ekiti State Approves N6.29bn for Ado-Ekiti Roads and Public Infrastructure Upgrades
item.description: Ekiti State Government don approve N6.29 billion to repair key roads for Ado-Ekiti township as part of their plan to improve urban mobility and boost socio-economic activities. Taiwo Olatunbosun, the ...

item.title: An Analysis of Louis Theroux's Documentary on the Manosphere
item.description: Louis Theroux's documentary 'Inside the Manosphere' arrives at a critical moment in public discussion about male supremacist online spaces. The film explores prominent 'manfluencers' who promote misog...

item.title: Iran vows to block Strait of Hormuz and continue conflict amid rising oil prices
item.description: Iran's newly appointed Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, vowed to continue blocking the Strait of Hormuz as a strategic leverage against the United States and Israel. His first comments were read on s...

item.title: Court of Appeal Confirms Wole Oluyede as PDP Governorship Candidate for Ekiti
item.description: The Court of Appeal in Akure, Ondo State, don overturn the earlier Federal High Court ruling wey nullify PDP governorship primary for Ekiti State. This appeal dey confirm say Wole Oluyede na the true ...

item.title: UK boosts security and imposes airspace restrictions for President Tinubu’s visit
item.description: UK authorities don announce serious security arrangements for the upcoming state visit of Nigerian President Bola Tinubu. The visit go happen between 17 and 18 March, and King Charles III go host am. ...

item.title: DSWD to provide P5,000 aid to tricycle drivers struggling with fuel costs
item.description: Many tricycle drivers in Metro Manila are experiencing financial strain due to the sharp rise in fuel prices. Drivers like Jaime Managuit report that their daily income is significantly reduced after ...

item.title: Pakistan Reaffirms Support for Saudi Arabia Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has reiterated Pakistan’s steadfast support for Saudi Arabia during challenging times, assuring Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman that Islamabad will stand firmly with the...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM Welcomes Supreme Court Ruling on OBC Creamy Layer and Calls for Fair Implementation
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M.K. Stalin has welcomed the Supreme Court’s recent verdict on the 'creamy layer' for the Other Backward Classes (OBC) reservation. The apex court clarified that parental inc...

item.title: Nelson Mandela Institute joins hands with Global Education Link to boost research and innovation
item.description: ARUSHA: The Nelson Mandela African Institute of Science and Technology don seal Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Global Education Link Ltd. The main goal of dis partnership be to strengthen rese...

item.title: Trump Criticizes Obama and Biden on Stair Climbing During Rally
item.description: During a rally in Hebron, Kentucky, President Donald Trump drew attention to what many considered a trivial complaint about former President Barack Obama’s way of descending stairs. Trump remarked to ...

item.title: Experts warn Tanzania needs more funding for PPP project preparation to attract private investment
item.description: Experts and economists in Tanzania are raising alarms that the current budget set aside for preparing Public–Private Partnership (PPP) projects is far too small to make a meaningful impact. The focus ...

item.title: Microsoft and Meta commit billions to expand data centre infrastructure amid AI growth
item.description: Microsoft and Meta Platforms have each committed nearly US$50 billion (around A$70 billion) in new data centre leases in their latest financial quarters, signalling a significant escalation in investm...
